title: My Simple Claude Cowork System (for normal people)
summary: Jeff Su presents Claude Cowork, a workspace architecture that turns Claude into an operating system for work using persistent memory, instruction files (CLAUDE.md), and a three-level hierarchy of workstations and projects. The system organizes work across root level, workstations, and project layers with practical applications including email management, spending trackers, and content drafting.
